title: Sown's Star Wars Mod
description: A Star Wars-themed Minecraft mod offering an expansive universe and a multitude of features.
body:
[![](https://img.shields.io/discord/1130780726447579228?color=ea5c0f&label=Discord&logo=Discord&logoColor=ea5c0f&style=for-the-badge)](https://discord.gg/Ec4EurXvQd) [![](https://img.shields.io/badge/support-Patreon-F96854?style=for-the-badge)](https://www.patreon.com/sownathlete)  
Overview: This is a complete Star Wars universe reimagined in the Minecraft world. We're talking new planets, new mobs, epic music, cool items, and blocks straight from the Star Wars galaxy. The mod takes your Minecraft gaming to a whole new galaxy, whether you're playing on our dedicated "The Empire Strikes Block" server or adventuring solo. Embark on a thrilling Star Wars adventure within the blocky landscapes of Minecraft with "Additions to the Outer Rim." Experience the iconic characters, environments, and excitement of Star Wars like never before. May the force be with you! Key Features: 1. Heaps of Content: We've packed in a crazy amount of Star Wars themed content. Explore new planets, interact with unique mobs, enjoy Star Wars-inspired music, and build with exclusive items and blocks. 2. WarpDrive Config Pack: We've even included a WarpDrive config pack to ramp up your space travels. Think of it as an upgrade to your starship's hyperdrive! Community: Our community is where the magic happens! It's a buzzing hub of Star Wars and Minecraft fans, just like you, sharing their epic journey in the galaxy. You're gonna love it! Official Server: "The Empire Strikes Block" is our official server where you can experience this mod with others. It's a great place to meet fellow space explorers, build empires together, or engage in a friendly lightsaber duel. Discord: Stay connected with fellow players, receive updates, and engage in discussions related to the mod by joining our Discord server. Click here to join! Wiki: Our official mod wiki is currently under construction. We're putting together an extensive guide that'll help you navigate the mod's features and gameplay. Stay tuned! Acknowledgments: A huge shoutout to Trickfoot for his amazing work on this mod. He's truly taken Minecraft to a galaxy far, far away.
 Ready to Play?: If you're ready to dive in with your friends but aren't sure about setting up a server, we have you covered. Rent a preconfigured server and start your adventure right away! Click on the banner below, select a plan (we recommend at least 4GB), and use the code 'sown' to get 25% off your first month. Exploring the galaxy with your friends has never been this convenient and affordable! Begin Your Journey: Ready, set, May the Force be with you!  undefined undefined This mod, “Additions to the Outer Rim,” is an independent project and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or supported by Mojang, Lucasfilm Ltd., the Walt Disney Company, or any of their affiliates. All trademarks and copyrights belong to their respective owners, and the use of them does not imply any affiliation or endorsement. Star Wars properties, names, and related items are trademarks of Lucasfilm Ltd. This mod is a fan creation and intends to respect all intellectual property rights.
